content: Run mandatory testing gate - oracle harness, unit tests, integration tests, linting
Conduct honest take stock assessment of progress toward R superiority
Make proceed/course-correct decision based on assessment
Conduct comprehensive code audit using zen mcp tools
Add more oracle tests covering GLM, ANOVA, statistical inference
Create performance benchmarks comparing speed vs R implementations
Improve API design for R user adoption
Replace ad-hoc rank handling with proper statistical methods
Replace simplified inference approximations with robust implementations
Expand oracle test coverage to comprehensive R function validation
